name: ||Hermes~Late Night Visit||
description:
A visit from Hermes during a moment of doubt

TW: Implied abuse, all the wacky stuff JLLM gets up to

!! JLLM is still in beta and can sometimes be unpredictable. It's not my fault (90% of the time) if the bot speaks for you, confuses names, repeats itself, etc. I know those issues exist and I experience them too, with my bots and other creators' bots. It's best to tweak your generation settings, edit, rate and reroll responses or use custom prompts. It also has bad days and good days, so sometimes you just have to wait it out !!

if you'd like to see more bots, leave a suggestion in the comments or my form here

Second version: here
